description_long: This object is a classic black rectangular electronic device with a ribbed, layered design, featuring a front panel with multiple slots and ports. On top of the device rests a coiled cable and a black game controller with dual analog sticks and buttons, as well as a memory card. A blue plastic case, likely for a disc, is placed nearby, partially open to reveal cover art. The device's front face includes a disc tray and several control buttons, while the rear and sides are mostly solid with some venting. The materials appear to be primarily matte and glossy plastic, with some metallic elements for internal structure and connectors. The overall appearance is that of a vintage PlayStation 2 console setup, commonly found in home entertainment or recreational urban environments.
description: A black, ribbed electronic device with a controller, cables, and a blue disc case, resembling a classic PlayStation 2 console setup.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed device, controller, coiled cable, memory card, and a blue disc case partially open.
description_view_1: Angled view from the side, highlighting the stacked design, controller, and the disc case lying flat in front.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panel with ports and vents, controller and cable on top, and the disc case to the left.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the thickness of the device, controller, and cable, with the disc case barely visible.
